---
title: "rUM"
description: "R Markdown and Quarto templates for academic papers and slide decks from the University of Miami. Also creates research projects with papers as vignettes."
image: ../../img/packages/rum.png
order: 5
categories: [templates, quarto, CRAN]
href: https://raymondbalise.github.io/rUM/
---

[Visit website →](https://raymondbalise.github.io/rUM/){.pkg-link target="_blank"}
